problem id: 01e395d0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10111100 -> 00011011
  00101100 -> 10011110
  10001101 -> 00011011
  11101000 -> 10111110
  01101010 -> 10101110
  01000001 -> 01110101
  01111111 -> 10000111
  00110010 -> 01101111

query: 11010100
predicted answer: 01011101
